title: CLI/Daemon Reliability Hardening
notes: Completed: 7 tasks implemented — tracing (29 statements), pool config builder, auth error variants, bundle validation, schema allOf verification, auth token validation, low-priority polish (dead_code, WAL, race, tuning, mutex, test org). All 12 residuals resolved.
